query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO content_schedule (channel_id, channel_name, show_name, show_type, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, description, host, is_recurring, is_active, priority, qumus_managed) VALUES
(1, 'RRB Main', 'Morning Groove', 'music', 'daily', '06:00', '10:00', 'Start your day with the best soul, jazz, and R&B', 'Valanna AI', true, true, 10, true),
(1, 'RRB Main', 'Midday Mix', 'music', 'daily', '10:00', '14:00', 'Eclectic mix of genres curated by QUMUS', 'QUMUS Auto-DJ', true, true, 8, true),

(1, 'RRB Main', 'Late Night Vibes', 'music', 'daily', '22:00', '06:00', 'Deep cuts and rare grooves through the night', 'QUMUS Auto-DJ', true, true, 5, true),
(2, 'Soul Kitchen', 'Soul Breakfast', 'music', 'daily', '07:00', '11:00', 'Classic and contemporary soul music', 'Valanna AI', true, true, 8, true),
(3, 'Jazz Lounge', 'Jazz Standards', 'music', 'daily', '08:00', '12:00', 'Timeless jazz standards and modern interpretations', 'QUMUS Auto-DJ', true, true, 7, true),
(7, 'Gospel Hour', 'Sunday Worship', 'gospel', 'sunday', '08:00', '12:00', 'Gospel music and worship programming', 'Community Host', true, true, 10, true),
(8, 'Community Voice', 'Community Roundtable', 'talk', 'monday', '19:00', '21:00', 'Weekly community discussion on current issues', 'Ty Bat Zan', true, true, 9, true),
(8, 'Community Voice', 'Family Hour', 'talk', 'wednesday', '19:00', '21:00', 'Family stories and legacy preservation', 'Candy AI', true, true, 9, true),
(10, 'Healing 432Hz', 'Morning Meditation', 'healing', 'daily', '05:00', '07:00', '432Hz healing frequencies for morning meditation', 'Valanna AI', true, true, 8, true),
(10, 'Healing 432Hz', 'Evening Restoration', 'healing', 'daily', '20:00', '23:00', 'Restorative healing frequencies for sleep preparation', 'QUMUS Auto-DJ', true, true, 7, true),
(11, 'Solfeggio 528Hz', 'DNA Repair Session', 'healing', 'daily', '06:00', '09:00', '528Hz Solfeggio frequency for transformation', 'QUMUS Auto-DJ', true, true, 7, true),
(15, 'Culture Corner', 'Heritage Hour', 'talk', 'friday', '18:00', '20:00', 'Celebrating Black culture, history, and achievement', 'Seraph AI', true, true, 8, true),
(20, 'Kids Zone', 'Storytime', 'talk', 'saturday', '09:00', '11:00', 'Children stories and educational content', 'Valanna AI', true, true, 9, true),
(30, 'Operator Alpha', 'Open Mic Night', 'live_event', 'friday', '21:00', '23:00', 'Live operator broadcast — open mic format', 'Operator', true, true, 8, false),
(42, 'Live Events', 'Selma Jubilee Coverage', 'live_event', 'saturday', '10:00', '22:00', 'Live coverage of the 61st Selma Bridge Crossing Jubilee', 'RRB Events Team', false, true, 10, true),
(42, 'Live Events', 'Sunday Bridge Crossing', 'live_event', 'sunday', '14:00', '18:00', 'Live broadcast of the historic Edmund Pettus Bridge crossing', 'RRB Events Team', false, true, 10, true),
(45, 'Emergency Alert', 'QUMUS Emergency Monitor', 'emergency', 'daily', '00:00', '23:59', '24/7 emergency monitoring and alert broadcast', 'QUMUS Emergency Response', true, true, 10, true),
(48, 'QUMUS Control', 'System Status Broadcast', 'news', 'daily', '00:00', '23:59', 'Continuous QUMUS system status and health updates', 'QUMUS System', true, true, 6, true),
(50, 'Celebration', 'Weekend Celebration Mix', 'music', 'saturday', '12:00', '18:00', 'Celebratory music for the weekend', 'QUMUS Auto-DJ', true, true, 7, true);
